name: Dongguan Chitwing Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Dongguan Chitwing Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells precision structural parts and molds in China. Its products are used in mobile phones, tablet computers, wearable products, and medical equipment components. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Dongguan, China. Dongguan Chitwing Technology Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Chit Wing Technology Group Company Limited.
